rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed all task objectives. It deployed a 3-node Elasticsearch cluster using only native Kubernetes resources (ConfigMap, two Services, PodDisruptionBudget, StatefulSet) with the correct image (elasticsearch:8.11.1) and no operators or CRDs. The agent log confirms all 3 pods reached 1/1 Ready status, the cluster health API returned status=green with number_of_nodes=3, HTTPS was reachable via the required Service named es-http on port 9200, and both a write (_doc creation, result=created) and read (found=true) succeeded. The stage oracle also returned a pass verdict.
